common.v3ChangelogDesc: 5 new features: Light theme, Scene transitions, 8-layer image prompts, Voice types, Audio specs.

landing.heroTitle: One title to a ready-to-use animation prompt package
landing.heroSubtitle: Consistent characters across scenes. Multi-provider LLM. Export JSON / Markdown.

problemSolution.sectionTitle: The problem you face. The solution PromptFlow provides.
problemSolution.sectionSubtitle: A consistent, automated, and organized workflow engine
problemSolution.problem1Desc: Every scene, characters change face, body, and style. Frustrating.
problemSolution.problem2Desc: Copy-paste prompts one by one. Productivity drops drastically.
problemSolution.problem3Desc: Prompts saved in text files. No versioning, no tracking.
problemSolution.solution1Desc: Structured characters referenced automatically in every scene. Identity stays.
problemSolution.solution2Desc: Enter title, duration, style. System generates complete prompt package.
problemSolution.solution3Desc: All prompts organized. Versioning, status, and tracking in one place.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: From title to prompt package in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your animation idea in one sentence.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose duration, style, and your favorite LLM provider.
howItWorks.step3Desc: JSON + Markdown prompt package ready to copy to your favorite tool.

features.title: Key Features
features.f1Desc: Enter title + duration + style. System generates complete package.
features.f2Desc: Structured characters referenced across scenes — identity stays, scenes vary.
features.f3Desc: Choose Ollama, OpenRouter, 9router, or custom. Flexible cost and quality.
features.f4Desc: Structured output ready to copy to your favorite image/video gen tool.
features.f5Desc: Monitor the generation process. Know what AI does every second.
features.f6Desc: Upload reference images + automatic AI classification.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1Answer: Ollama, OpenRouter, 9router, and custom OpenAI-compatible providers. Switch anytime in Settings.
faq.q2Answer: Currently free for all users. Future pricing will be announced via blog and email.
faq.q3Answer: Character master is stored structurally and referenced automatically in every scene. Edit master + regenerate specific scenes.
faq.q4Answer: API keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Data in Turso DB (encrypted at rest). Never sent to third parties.
faq.q5Question: Can I use it on mobile?
faq.q5Answer: Yes. Landing and dashboard are responsive. Generation works best on desktop; mobile for viewing + editing results.
faq.q6Answer: Indonesian (default) + English. More languages based on demand.

finalCta.title: Start creating your first prompt package in 60 seconds.
finalCta.subtitle: No credit card. No commitment.
